# Nina Therapy

> Essential information about Nina Therapy, clinical services, and contact details.

## Overview

Nina is a certified and accredited music therapist, sound healer, mindfulness and hatha yoga teacher, and gym instructor based in London (UK). Her practice blends ancient healing traditions with modern wellness approaches, creating a unique space for personal transformation through the power of voices, mantras and sounds. Sessions are open to everyone — all ages, backgrounds and experience levels. No prior experience is needed. Donations are welcome.

## Main sections

- [Home](https://ninatherapy.vercel.app/): Main landing page with the therapeutic approach, services overview, gallery, benefits, FAQ and class schedule.
- [About](https://ninatherapy.vercel.app/#about): Professional background, philosophy, and qualifications — certified music therapist, sound healer, hatha yoga teacher and gym instructor active in London, Italy and Canary Islands.
- [Services](https://ninatherapy.vercel.app/#services): Detailed overview of five therapy modalities — Music Therapy, Sound Therapy, Hatha Yoga & Mindfulness, Pet Therapy, and Aromatherapy.
- [Contact](https://ninatherapy.vercel.app/#contact): Booking information and direct email contact (Nicogori15@yahoo.com).

## Technical metadata

- **Type:** Clean HTML/CSS/JS static site (no heavy CMS)
- **Sitemap:** https://ninatherapy.vercel.app/sitemap.xml
